models.teamContact: A named point of contact for a specific inquiry type (government, investor, media). Includes name, title, email, and the inquiry categories they handle.
models.partnerLogo: A trust-signal logo from a partner, certifying body, or award-granting organization. Displayed in a grayscale grid.
models.officeInfo: Physical office location with address, city, phone, email, and an embedded map placeholder.
models.inquiryType: A category of project inquiry — used as dropdown options in the detailed form.
models.downloadableResource: A gated or ungated downloadable file (e.g., capability statement PDF) offered as immediate value to prospects.
models.schedulingInfo: Configuration for a 'Schedule a Call' CTA linking to an external calendar or booking tool.
models.formField: Basic and detailed field definitions for the two-tier contact form.

relationships: teamContact entries are standalone — each handles one or more inquiryCategories.
partnerLogo entries are standalone — grid display.
officeInfo is a singleton — one office displayed.
inquiryType entries drive the projectType dropdown in the detailed form.
downloadableResource is a singleton — one primary resource offered.
schedulingInfo is a singleton — one call-to-action link.
